feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Creating Test Users for Fit to Standard WS (email field mandatory)
entry.content:
Hello expert guys, 

We are carrying out preparation activities in out TDD environment (S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition), and following the steps suggested by the methodology, we are creating the Test Users as preparation for Fit to Standard workshops. 

In our System (Starter in customer landscape, and equivalent is Customizing tenant in Partner TDD because here is only one system landscape) the system is requiring a Worker employee created to create the business user, but for the worker master data the email assignment is mandatory, and cannot be repeated. So, as the implementation methodology suggest to create one test user for one role, saying:

"In starter system, create 1 test user per role in a test script. e.g. for Customer Project Management (J11) first name / last name = Project Manager / Commercial Services This makes the demo very applicable to customer experts, who see exactly the apps and processes they would see for their individual roles involved in the overall test script E2E process".

The question is: It is applicable to the TDD Customizing tenant ? Because in our tenant (TDD) the system is requiring a Worker created before to create the business user, but for the worker employee master data the email assignment is mandatory, and cannot be repeated. So, if for example, we need to create 10 test users, we need to have 10 different email accounts? Thats not possible in all cases so we need to know if there is the possibilty to create the test users without the email address. Of course this would only apply for test users since consultants do have email accounts.

Thank you very much in advance for your response and guidance,

Best Regards,

entry.title: F-51 in public
entry.content:
Hello community!

In fioriappslibrary, F-51 is searched as Post Journal Entries - With Clearing. Please tell me how I can run the app. Even if I search for it in Fiori launchpad, it doesn't come up. (version 2402)

Huny

entry.title: How to do the Synchronous B2BCustomer replication from SAP Commerce to S/4 Hana
entry.content:
We have came across a requirement to Integrate the Outbound B2BCustomer data from SAP Commerce to S/4 Hana public cloud using sync call.

As we have Asynchronous call in OOTB where we can send the data to CPI and we will not read the response data from CPI, how we can integrate the Outbound B2BCustomer data Synchronously .

Thank you

entry.title: Create Business Role
entry.content:
Hi Expert !

I have an issue when create Business Role. So, my client separate task between the person who monitor Purchase Order and Create Purchase Order. But in SAP Public Cloud when I want to create Business Role, I have to take all apps in one Business Catalog. The issue is both of the apps were exist in one Business Catalog. I try to give restriction in Business Role. In access categories I'm not give write access to user who have task monitor the Purchase Order, but they still able to create the Purchase Order. Am I miss any step? or do we have specific Catalog for this ?  If so please let me know

entry.title: S4HC attachment API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV - value lists SAPObjectNodeType
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying Attachment API - API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/GetAllOriginals. I need the lists of SAPObjectNodeType, SAPObjectType , SemanticObject, BusinessObjectTypeName.

Where can I find them?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: Define Custom Routines for Data Transfer to Billing Documents (BADI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER usage)
entry.content:
Hi,

In S4HANA Public Cloud System while creating new Billing Document in VF01 i want to trigger  SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER (Custom Data Transfer for Billing Documents) BADI.

This BADI have a filter DATA_TRANSFER. To use the BADI i need to set up some configuration for this filter. Here is a Documentation description: 

Does anybody know how to do this configuration? I cannot find any application like this

  • Define Custom Routines for Data Transfer to Billing Documents

Have anybody already used this BADI?

Regards

Vitali

entry.title: Adding GL account the FSV
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I have added new GL accounts using the 'manage GL master data app. The GL was copied from the existing GL as usual and was copied on to the Chart of accounts and company. However when I try to assign this GL to the FSV it does not show up as well. I have tried the classic version as well as the manage global Hierarchies app'. 

This was possible earlier using the 'Copy FSV assignment' anymore. 

The question is how do I assign these unassigned GL accounts to the financial statements? 

 

Regards

Chintan

 

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Satistical object cost collector is sap public cloud
entry.content:
Dear all

we are currently implementing S/4HANA cloud public edition.

WBS (PS) is the main Cost/Revenue object used in the designed solution. But our client needs also to track the costs of construction machinery used in the sites.

So we need to allocate the costs to WBS as a true object and additionnaly to a statistical object : it used to be the statistical internal order in S/4.

As mentionned in Note 2724606, internal order functionality is no more supported :

The request is : What statistical object can be associated to WBS ?

Thanks

entry.title: WSDL must not contain WSRM policies S/4HANA Public CLoud Journal Entry POst
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am downloading WSDL from S/4HANA Public Cloud Scenario 002 Journal Entry Post but when importing this into SOAP adpater in BTP Integration Suite CLoud Integration Capability it is giving me error 

"WSDL must not contain WSRM policies"

Any idea why?

thanks

ebsor

entry.title: Service request
entry.content: Is it possible to create a service request in Public Cloud?

entry.title: Update Sales BOM master data
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm in SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud and I want you to ask if it's possible for you to create, in SAP BTP, an app that is able to, based on changes to a sales BOM in the sales order (for example, add or delete a sub-position), also modify the respective BOM master data by adding or deleting the modified positions in the sales order.

Kind regards,

Emanuele

entry.title: Purchase & Sales Register in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can please suggest is there any standard APPs available for the Purchase Register and Sales Register.

 

thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP RAP Application Item node create button not visible Odata V2
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created a custom RAP application with Header/Item data with Draft functionality using OData V2 service. While Preview service from Eclipse Create button at Item level is visible. 

But when the service is deployed using BAS on Public cloud system the Create button is not visible.

Can you guide me in this on why create button is not visible once OData v2 service is deployed and How can I make the create button visible.

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Print in mass Sales orders (ORDER_CONFIRMATION) in SAP S/4HANA cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Our Customer would like to print in mass the Sales order forms (output: ORDER_CONFIRMATION).

To clarify: they want to print multiple sales orders forms at the same time.

Which SAP S/4HANA cloud app can we use for that?

Thank you for your help.

Regards,
Nelly GOMIS

entry.title: #COE #BA01 Deleting an errant unposted Invoice Cancelation
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a situation where someone cancelled in error a customer invoice that was posted and cleared/paid in 2023.

We're trying to get rid of this invoice cancellation sd billing document which has not been posted as financial document (it is blocked based on the 2023 period not being open), how do we do this in S/4HANA Public Cloud? 

We do not see a delete option for it and we absolutely do not want it posted as a journal entry since it was errant.

Based on searches in the knowledge base and forums we see old ECC postings referencing Note 388489 - Cancelation of a cancelation document, however this note doesn't appear available to us any longer.

Best,

Ryan

entry.title: Custom Pre-Condition for Workflow Parked Invoice as Complete
entry.content:
I have a request to add a Cost Center option in the Workflow for Parked Invoice as Complete pre-condition, start condition section.

I have created a new pre-condition with the name BAdI: Cost Center with custom logic in SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF.

but the option for BAdI: Cost Center does not yet exist and I read that it requires custom logic again with SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL

I want to display something like a pop-up window (search help) like that

so that users can immediately choose. Can it be done like that? Thank You

entry.title: WS00800304 issue - Purchase Contract displayed twice for first approver in My Inbox app
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

please, help me with issue of displaying PC twice in My Inbox app for the first approver.

As you can see from Flexible WF administration app, one is already completed (approved by all approvers) and second is still In Process waiting for first approval: 


When first task was approved, that disappeared but not the 2nd task - this still remains in the first approvers inbox.

What could be the issue? 

Thank you very much for all of your prompt answers.
KR
Veronika Skybova

entry.title: Excel Upload By RAP Without Extending on SAP BTP/Business Application Studio Platform?
entry.content:
I want to Upload Data by Excel using RAP Applications, without Extending this Service on SAP BTP Platform Bcoz in my case we dont have any BTP Subscription.

I Already go through with this Blog and it is working fine but here we need to extend the service on BTP Platform. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/excel-upload-using-rap-part-1/ba-p/13545399

So please suggest how we can acheive the same using RAP Application Only.

entry.title: Tables on Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Fellow SAP Practitioners,

I am curious to know, how we can get tables, data storage views in cloud?

entry.title: Odata API External Scheduler Integration Problem
entry.content:
I can't using api GET ApplicationLogMessageSet in group External Scheduler Integration. Option $expand in api ApplicationLogHeaderSet return same error and status code(500).

Base URL is my url system tenant SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud. 

In Eclipse ADT tool. SAP Gateway Error log return this log error. 

Is error of SAP API or I do something wrong? Give me help.

Thanks a lot.
